---
title: "Jan Hofmann"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/self.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YAyeMm4AAAAJ&hl=en&authuser=1
---

PhD student in the Chapman lab at Stony Brook University[cite: 5, 56]. [cite_start]In my research I focus on structural transformations in Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs)[cite: 7, 57].

## Education

**Stony Brook University** | Stony Brook, NY  
Ph.D. in Chemistry | [cite_start]2021 – present 

* [cite_start]Focus on in situ characterization of metal-organic frameworks [cite: 42]
* [cite_start]Expected graduation: May 2027 [cite: 46]

**Leipzig University** | Leipzig, Germany  
M.Sc. in Chemistry | [cite_start]2018 – 2021 [cite: 47, 48]

* [cite_start]Thesis: Development of multicomponent alloys for fuel cell applications [cite: 49]

**Leipzig University** | Leipzig, Germany  
B.Sc. in Chemistry | [cite_start]2014 – 2018 [cite: 51, 52]

* [cite_start]Thesis: Influences of neutral salt depleted mother liquor on the MFI-synthesis with respect to the hydrothermal stability of the zeolite [cite: 53]
